name: Jumbo Shrimp Marsalla, Housewife Style
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red onion, chopped into 1/4-inch dice
1 rib celery with leaves, chopped into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
2. Peel and de-vein the shrimp.
3. Heat olive oil over medium-high heat in a 12- to 14-inch earthenware casserole (both stove and oven-resistant).
4. Add onion and celery to the hot oil and cook until soft.
5. Add tomatoes, pine nuts, currants, capers, Marsala wine, fennel stalk, and bay leaf. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and place shrimp in one layer at the bottom of the casserole.
7. Place the casserole in the oven and bake uncovered for 6 to 7 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven, sprinkle with grated Pecorino cheese, and allow it to stand for 15 minutes.
9. Serve warm or let it cool and serve refrigerated.
Yield: 4 servings
